task_completion.description: Open or create the facility record for 'Westside Cold Storage' in CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager application is open and displaying a facility record with the Facility Name set to 'Westside Cold Storage'.

task_completion.description: Update the Location of Keys information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location of Keys' field contains the text: 'Knox Box 3200 mounted on the yellow bollard at Gate 2'.
The 'Site Access' field contains the text: 'Primary access via North Service Road. Heavy trucks must use Gate 2.'.
The 'Security' field contains the text: 'Perimeter fence with 24-hr CCTV. Night watchman on duty 2200-0600.'.

task_completion.description: Update the Internal Location / Notes information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Internal Location' or 'Notes' field contains the text: 'Door Code: 7721#'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the application's forms genuinely.
